hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Functional diarrhea / irinotecan-induced diarrhea with dehydration
hospitalizations.reason: Grade 3 irinotecan-induced diarrhea and Grade 3 neutropenia (ANC 0.6) after cycle 6 of FOLFIRI plus ramucirumab; managed with IV fluids, loperamide, empiric antibiotics, and filgrastim

hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Sigmoid colon adenocarcinoma - planned surgical resection
hospitalizations.reason: Planned laparoscopic sigmoid colectomy with primary anastomosis for local tumor control; intermittent partial colonic obstruction and hematochezia

medications.frequency: evening before and morning of infusion
